"We need you on that gun, Noble. Or the Autumn's sitting in her grave." - Jacob Keyes
"You're going to have to take down that cruiser, Spartan!" - Jacob Keyes
"Cruiser, moving into position. I need it dead!" - Jacob Keyes
"Mass driver won't crack those shields! Steady, Spartan!" - Jacob Keyes
"Fire now, Lieutenant! Hit her in the gut!" - Jacob Keyes
"You have to fire now, Spartan! We won't survive another hit!" - Jacob Keyes
"Aim for the glassing port!" - Jacob Keyes
"Good guns, Spartan. All stations: brace for cast-off." - Jacob Keyes
"This is the Pillar of Autumn. We're away. And the Package is with us." - Jacob Keyes
"Cortana, all I need to know is, did we lose them?" - Captain Jacob Keyes
"I think we both know the answer to that." - Cortana
"It didn't take long for Reach to fall. Our enemy was ruthless. Efficient. But they weren't nearly fast enough." - Catherine Halsey

"For you had already passed the torch. And because of you, we found Halo, unlocked its secrets, shattered our enemy's resolve. Our victory - your victory - was so close... I wish you could have lived to see it." - Catherine Halsey
"But you belong to Reach. Your body, your armor - all burned and turned to glass. Everything...except your courage. That, you gave to us. And with it, we can rebuild." - Catherine Halsey
